title: Ruby Things
description: A Mod that  adds Rubies + more
body: # What is Ruby Things? Ruby things is a mod that adds all things ruby. Armor, Weapons, Tools, + More # FAQ ### Q: Will there be a forge port? A: No. But the mod is open source so if you want to make a forge port go ahead. As long as you credit me as the original creator ### Q: Can I use this is in my modpack? A: Sure! I don't mind my mod being in a modpack
